name: Topsports International Holdings Limited
summary: Topsports International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates sportswear retail and service platforms in China. As of February 29, 2020, it operated a retail network, which included 8,395 directly-operated stores. The company also offers information technology services; and trades in sportswear products. Topsports International Holdings Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Topsports International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Belle Sports Limited.
